summary: Comprehensive testing of Loans Module completed successfully. Backend: 17/19 tests passed (89%). Frontend: All UI features verified working - multi-vehicle dropdown, vehicle details modal, loan processing modal with bank eligibility check, search, and status filters.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 404 for invalid vehicle_id - should return 404 for non-existent vehicle
Pagination may return duplicate items when data changes between requests - minor race condition

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Bank eligibility check is MOCKED - returns random eligibility with 70% chance of approval. Not connected to real bank APIs.
Vaahan API integration is working - fetches real vehicle data (manufacturer, model, fuel type, owner count, registration date, insurance validity)
Multi-vehicle support working correctly - customers can have multiple vehicles with per-vehicle loan details
Per-vehicle bank eligibility check working - shows eligible banks with interest rates, max amounts, EMI, tenure, processing fees
seed_data_creation: Test data exists: 10 loan leads, Rajesh Sharma has 2 vehicles (KA01AB1234, KA48N1000), Vikram Singh has 2 vehicles, 4 banks configured (HDFC, ICICI, Axis, Kotak)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loans Module fully functional. Multi-vehicle support working. Bank eligibility check is MOCKED (70% approval rate). Vaahan API integration working for vehicle data fetch. All CRUD operations for vehicles working. Loan applications can be created and tracked per vehicle per bank.

backend_tests.test: Lead with multiple vehicles (Rajesh has 2 cars)
Banks have required loan configuration fields
Add vehicle with Vaahan API integration

frontend_tests.test: Login and navigate to Loans page
Stats cards display correctly (10 leads, 3 interested, 4 banks)
Customer table displays all loan leads
Multi-vehicle dropdown shows '2 Cars' for Rajesh Sharma
Single vehicle shows vehicle number in dropdown (KA02MH5678)
Vehicle Details Modal opens with all vehicle info
Vaahan API data displayed (manufacturer, model, fuel, owners, reg date)
Add New Vehicle with Vaahan integration
Loan Processing Modal shows per-vehicle eligibility
Check Eligibility button works - shows 3 of 4 banks eligible
Bank eligibility results table with interest, amount, EMI, tenure, fees
Apply button available for eligible banks
Active Applications section shows applied banks
Add button for customers without vehicles

mocked_apis.Bank eligibility check: POST /api/loan-leads/{lead_id}/vehicles/{vehicle_id}/check-eligibility returns MOCKED data - 70% random approval rate, not connected to real bank APIs
